input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.10.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.10.4.1
            TITLE: scoring term definitions

            CONTENT:
            rule D.10.4.1: Scoring Term Definitions
D.10.4.1 Scoring Term Definitions 
• Corrected Time = ( Right Lap Time + Left Lap Time ) / 2 + ( DOO * 0.125 ) 
• Tyour  -  the best Corrected Time for the team  
• Tmin  -  is the lowest Corrected Time recorded for any team  
• Tmax  -  125% of Tmin

final_answer: rule D.10.4.1: Scoring Term Definitions D.10.4.1 Scoring Term Definitions • Corrected Time = ( Right Lap Time + Left Lap Time ) / 2 + ( DOO * 0.125 ) • Tyour - the best Corrected Time for the team • Tmin - is the lowest Corrected Time recorded for any team • Tmax - 125% of Tmin
